nasb.text: How blessed is the man who has made the Lord his trust, And has not turned to the proud, nor to those who lapse into falsehood.

esv.text: Blessed is the man who makes the Lord his trust, who does not turn to the proud, to those who go astray after a lie!

cnv.text: 那倚靠耶和華， 不轉向高傲和偏向虛謊的人的， 這人是有福的。

ccb.text: 信靠耶和华的人有福了！ 他们不随从骄傲自大、信靠假神的人。

csbs.text: 那以耶和华为依赖的人是蒙福的， 他不转向骄傲，不偏向虚谎。
